transcript.text: Hi, this is Sarah from Banyan HVAC. We're closed for the night, but I can take down what's going on and route to the on-call tech. Who am I speaking with?
Hi Sarah, this is John Doe. My furnace just stopped working and the house is freezing.
Got it John — I see you're at 1024 Pine, gold tier. Is the furnace fully dead, or just blowing cold?
Cold air. Thermostat's calling for heat but nothing.
Marking this priority. I'll page Mike, our on-call tech. He'll call back in 30 minutes and I'll send a proposal for the repair tier you're on.
All set John. Stay warm — Mike will be in touch shortly and you'll get the proposal email within the hour.

tool_calls.name: lookup_record
tool_calls.summary: matched caller to account acme_hvac/1024_pine gold tier

tool_calls.name: dispatch_tech
tool_calls.summary: paged on-call tech Mike for 30-minute callback
